name: 57 & Honey Glazed Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 4 skinless boneless chicken breast halves, each cut into 8 cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the Heinz 57 sauce and honey; set aside.
2. Alternately thread chicken and vegetables on skewers.
3. Spray with cooking spray.
4. Grill over medium heat for 12 to 15 minutes, turning often, until chicken is cooked.
5. Brush liberally with the 57 sauce mixture.
6. Grill until kabobs are brown and glazed, about 5 minutes.
Makes 4 servings.
